title: Cups Over Bottles
description: Transform your Minecraft experience with 3D-modeled cups replacing bottles and a tea-with-milk cup for honey! 🍵 Perfect for tea lovers and those craving a cozy, immersive aesthetic. Compatible with multiple versions and easy to install—upgrade your visual
body:
# 🥤 **Cups Over Bottles Resource Pack**  

🚀 **Transform your Minecraft drinking experience!**  

This resource pack **replaces all bottles** in the game with beautifully crafted **3D-modeled cups** to elevate the way you enjoy beverages in Minecraft. 🍵 But that’s not all – the **honey bottle** has been swapped out for the ultimate drink: a cozy cup of **tea with milk**, because, let’s be honest, tea with milk is the best drink ever.  

### ✨ **What This Pack Does**  
- All **bottles** now appear as **stylish 3D cups**. 🥛  
- The **honey bottle** is replaced with a **tea with milk cup**, perfect for those soothing Minecraft evenings. ☕  

### ❓ **Why Download This Pack?**  
- **Enhanced immersion**: Make your Minecraft world feel cozier and more refined with realistic, detailed cups.  
- **Perfect for tea lovers**: Show off your appreciation for the finest drink (tea with milk!) in a way no other pack offers.  
- **Aesthetic upgrade**: Bring an extra touch of charm to your builds and adventures.  

### ⚠️ **Important Info**  
- **Visual Only**: This is a texture/resource pack and does not alter gameplay mechanics.  
- **Installation**: Simply drop the `.zip` file into your Minecraft resource packs folder, activate it in-game, and enjoy!
